title: Man, The
content:
A man said to the universe,
    "Sir, I exist!"
    "However," replied the universe,
    "The fact has not created in me
    A sense of obligation."
meaning:
"Man, The" is a quintessential example of Stephen Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
